Gorgeous ornamental crabapple with small, bright vermilion fruit. NO PERMISSION TO PICK, ASK POLITELY AND SEE WHETHER YOU CAN! Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Multiple big, old apple (and crabapple?) trees around the entrance/pay booth at Ferrettie/Baugo Creek County Park. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
